summary: Test suite covers basic happy path well (pattern matching, deduplication, mixed files) with good fixture organization, but critically misses: (1) error scenarios entirely—no tests for invalid patterns, malformed rules, or null/undefined inputs; (2) priority ordering verification—Test 7 claims to test priority but only checks labels exist, not that ordering is respected; (3) glob pattern edge cases—special characters, overlapping patterns, case sensitivity; (4) functions outside assignLabels—assignLabelsDetailed and CLI functionality untested; (5) globToRegex logic—pattern escaping edge cases like 'file[1].ts' unverified. Would catch basic regressions but miss priority implementation bugs, pattern escaping issues, and error handling gaps.
